Coerce

Getters and Setters

has_groups() get_groups() `set_groups<-`() get_samples() `set_samples<-`() get_totals() `set_totals<-`()

Get or Set Parts of an Object

`[`(<AbundanceMatrix>) `[`(<CompositionMatrix>) `[<-`(<AbundanceMatrix>) `[[<-`(<AbundanceMatrix>)

Data cleaning

remove_NA() remove_empty() remove_zero()

Data Cleaning

replace_NA()

Data Replacement

Predicates

is_square() is_symmetric()

Matrix Predicates

is_missing() is_zero() is_odd() is_even() is_positive() is_negative() is_whole()

Numeric Predicates

is_scalar_list() is_scalar_atomic() is_scalar_vector() is_scalar_numeric() is_scalar_integer() is_scalar_double() is_scalar_character() is_scalar_logical()

Scalar Type Predicates

is_constant() is_increasing() is_decreasing()

Numeric Trend Predicates

is_list() is_atomic() is_vector() is_numeric() is_integer() is_double() is_character() is_logical() is_error() is_warning() is_message()

Type Predicates

is_empty() is_named()
